rule: A judge-facing claim may appear in README, video, deck, or SUBMISSION only when this matrix has a verified row with product and proof evidence.

claims.claim: A judge can reject one unsafe RWA agent trade in about 60 seconds.
claims.user_action: Click Run refused trade, choose a shock, then click Let the agent try.
claims.visible_result: The workbench shows a red NO receipt with refusal reason and proof fields.
claims.backend_or_storage_proof: POST /api/runs/refuse writes a Durable Object receipt record; tests/hero.spec.ts verifies the saved receipt text.
claims.proof_type: Playwright test plus live receipt screen

claims.claim: The refusal receipt records wallet identity, policy hash, calldata hash, shock hash, and proof hash.
claims.user_action: Open the latest receipt after a refused run.
claims.visible_result: The receipt detail page lists walletAddress, policyHash, calldataHash, shockHash, and proofHash.
claims.backend_or_storage_proof: GET /api/receipts/:id reads the persisted receipt record from the Durable Object ledger.
claims.proof_type: Receipt detail page and Playwright row assertions

claims.claim: The chain path prepares and binds RefusalHub proof on Arbitrum Sepolia.
claims.user_action: Click Prepare tx data or send/bind the chain proof from the receipt detail page.
claims.visible_result: The receipt shows RefusalHub transaction data or an explorer tx link.
claims.backend_or_storage_proof: Arbitrum Sepolia refused demo tx https://sepolia.arbiscan.io/tx/0x0b809bc31f75b6ff5947ccb5875dc5df975e1fe379b3a533f8e84454e42bf372 and deployments/arbitrum-sepolia.json.

claims.claim: The same policy can allow a safe standing action while refusing the unsafe principal sale.
claims.user_action: Click Safe sweep after a refusal run.
claims.visible_result: An OK receipt appears next to NO receipts with POLICY_PASS.
claims.backend_or_storage_proof: POST /api/runs/safe writes an allowed Durable Object record; tests/hero.spec.ts checks Allowed and POLICY_PASS.
claims.submission_field: Why it fits the judging criteria

claims.claim: The product has a second-role auditor/history surface, not only a single demo screen.
claims.user_action: Open receipt history as auditor after creating receipts.
claims.visible_result: The page shows persisted proof rail records for auditor review.
claims.backend_or_storage_proof: Durable Object receipt records are listed across role/history views; tests/hero.spec.ts verifies auditor role access.

claims.claim: The public deployment and tests are judge-ready.
claims.user_action: Open the live URL and run the deployed Playwright smoke path.
claims.visible_result: The public hero and workbench CTA load, then the deployed E2E path passes.
claims.backend_or_storage_proof: .hunter/gates/G5-public-smoke.report.json records deployed 18-test pass and deployment version 07ec3378-01eb-4df1-ab1c-c9ad9e40038e.
claims.proof_type: Public smoke report and test command
